ceiling_reason: Multiple evidence rows are UNSUPPORTED (UI spec, auth design, test plan) and several gaps are structural, not cosmetic. Even with all backend primitives confirmed, the proposal as stated lacks the detail required for a safe, reviewable build. Score cannot reach 100 without a concrete component spec, API contract, auth model, and test plan.

evidence.claim: dry-run concept exists in spec pipeline module
evidence.perspective: Backend spec_pipeline module already implements dry-run logic, confirming the backend primitive exists to surface in a panel

evidence.claim: dedicated test file for spec pipeline dry-run exists
evidence.perspective: Test coverage for the dry-run path already exists, lowering risk of regression when adding UI panel

evidence.claim: dashboard/components/ is safe to modify freely per AGENTS.md
evidence.perspective: Panel component additions fall in the ✅ tier, no extra approval needed

evidence.claim: Mission Control panel concept is referenced in app/static/index.html
evidence.perspective: Static HTML mentions 'spec', suggesting some existing UI surface, but Mission Control as a named panel is not confirmed

evidence.claim: pipeline route module exists and is safe to extend
evidence.perspective: app/server/routes/ including pipeline route is listed as ✅ free to modify

evidence.claim: dry-run is referenced across multiple test files indicating broad usage pattern
evidence.perspective: dry-run pattern is cross-cutting, not isolated to spec_pipeline, supporting value of a unified panel

evidence.claim: proposal defines specific UI layout, interaction model, or data contract for the panel
evidence.perspective: Proposal text is a single sentence with no wireframe, API contract, or component spec — UX clarity is entirely absent

evidence.claim: proposal specifies authentication/authorisation requirements for the dry-run panel endpoint
evidence.perspective: No mention of auth gating; dry-run could expose pipeline internals if endpoint is unguarded

evidence.claim: proposal defines acceptance criteria or new test cases for the panel
evidence.perspective: No test plan stated; existing test_spec_pipeline_dry_run.py covers backend only, not the UI panel

evidence.claim: cost/token impact of exposing dry-run results in real-time panel is assessed
evidence.perspective: Dry-run may invoke Claude calls; no budget or rate-limit analysis provided

gaps: No UI specification: missing component name, props interface, data-fetch strategy (polling vs WebSocket vs REST), and placement within Mission Control layout
No API contract: which endpoint serves dry-run results to the panel, what request/response schema, and whether it is a new route or extension of existing pipeline route
No auth/authorisation design: dry-run panel could expose sensitive pipeline internals; proposal must specify required role/token scope
No acceptance criteria or definition of done beyond 'add panel'
No cost analysis: dry-run invocations may consume Claude tokens or Railway compute; budget impact not addressed
No error-state UX defined: what does the panel show on dry-run failure, timeout, or partial result?
Iteration 1 with no prior feedback loop — proposal has not been refined against any reviewer input
proposal: Add dry-run spec pipeline panel to Mission Control
